summary: Media Proxy Streaming + Cache Headers VERIFIED - ALL 18 BACKEND TESTS PASSED. Videos now stream via StreamingResponse in 64KB chunks (never buffered). Surrogate-Control header present in ALL responses (survives ingress override). Images still buffered+cached. Dashboard renders 30 images via proxy with 0 direct R2 URLs.

minor.issue: CDN-Cache-Control header is stripped by Kubernetes ingress (not visible in response). This is expected infrastructure behavior - Surrogate-Control survives and serves the same purpose.

critical_code_review_comments: media_proxy.py uses StreamingResponse for video/audio with 64KB chunks (STREAM_CHUNK_SIZE = 65536) - VERIFIED
_safari_safe_headers() adds Surrogate-Control, CDN-Cache-Control, and Cache-Control - VERIFIED
Surrogate-Control header survives ingress override and is present in ALL response types - VERIFIED
CDN-Cache-Control is stripped by ingress (expected) - Surrogate-Control serves same purpose
Images use _image_response() with buffered Response (small files, LRU cached) - VERIFIED
Videos use StreamingResponse with async generator yielding 64KB chunks - VERIFIED
Range requests return HTTP 206 with Content-Range header - VERIFIED
HEAD requests return Content-Length and Accept-Ranges=bytes - VERIFIED

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard renders 30 images via proxy, 0 direct R2 URLs)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Media proxy streaming + cache headers verified. Key findings: 1) Videos use StreamingResponse (async generator yielding 64KB chunks) - never buffered in memory, 2) Surrogate-Control header survives ingress override and is present in ALL response types (image GET, video GET, video range 206, HEAD), 3) CDN-Cache-Control is stripped by ingress (expected behavior), 4) Cache-Control is overridden by ingress to 'no-store' (expected), 5) Images still buffered+LRU cached (small files), 6) Dashboard renders 30 images via proxy with 0 direct R2 URLs.

image_cache_hit_returns_all_headers.details: Second request (cache hit) returns ETag and Surrogate-Control

video_get_without_range_returns_200_stre.details: HTTP 200 with video/mp4, streamed via StreamingResponse

all_response_types_have_surrogate_contro.details: Image GET, Video GET full, Video GET range, HEAD image, HEAD video - all have Surrogate-Control

dashboard_api_returns_proxy_urls.details: All URLs in story feed use /api/media/r2/ prefix

dashboard_renders_images_via_proxy.details: 30 images rendered via proxy, 0 direct R2 URLs

infrastructure_notes.ingress_cache_control_override: Kubernetes ingress overrides Cache-Control to 'no-store' - this is expected platform behavior
infrastructure_notes.cdn_cache_control_stripped: CDN-Cache-Control header is stripped by ingress - Surrogate-Control serves the same purpose and survives
infrastructure_notes.surrogate_control_survives: Surrogate-Control header survives ingress and is present in all responses - this is the key header for CDN caching
infrastructure_notes.streaming_implementation: Videos use StreamingResponse with async generator yielding 64KB chunks - never buffered in memory
